title: Expecting unknown properties to be ignored when creating a RACE TRACK
gherkin:
When the user creates a "RACE TRACK" "Lausitzring" with the following data
  | key          | value                |
  | name         | Lausitzring          |
  | opened       | 2000                 |
  | closed       |                      |
  | type         | permanent race track |
  | location     | Klettwitz            |
  | geo_position | 51°32'0"N 13°55'10"E |
  | country_code | DE                   |
  | thimbleweed  | park                 |
Then the response should contain the following properties
  | key          | value                |
  | name         | Lausitzring          |
  | opened       | 2000                 |
  | closed       |                      |
  | type         | permanent race track |
  | location     | Klettwitz            |
  | geo_position | 51°32'0"N 13°55'10"E |
  | country_code | DE                   |
And the response should NOT contain the following keys
  | key         |
  | thimbleweed |
